title: Verify existing implementation of pagination helper
description: The pagination helper `paginate<T>(items: T[], page: number, pageSize: number): { data: T[]; total: number; pages: number; hasNext: boolean }` already exists in `src/services/pagination.ts` with comprehensive tests in `src/services/pagination.test.ts`. All 15 tests pass covering: basic pagination (first/middle/last page), edge cases (empty array, pageSize larger than total, exact boundary, page size of 1), error handling (page < 1, pageSize < 1), type safety (different types, objects, reference preservation), and page calculations.
existing_patterns: src/services/pagination.ts uses generic function signature following existing utility patterns in src/utils/ - single-responsibility function with co-located .test.ts file
src/services/pagination.test.ts follows vitest describe/it pattern consistent with other test files in src/utils/ and src/services/
